parameters.query:
SELECT barcode, standard_name, brand, category, supplier_unit, pos_unit, default_conversion_rate,
       ts_rank(to_tsvector('simple', standard_name), plainto_tsquery('simple', {{$json.pending_item.item_name ? "'" + String($json.pending_item.item_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "''"}})) AS rank
FROM global_fmcg_master
WHERE to_tsvector('simple', standard_name) @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', {{$json.pending_item.item_name ? "'" + String($json.pending_item.item_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "''"}})
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO user_sessions (zalo_user_id, session_state, context_data, pending_invoice, expires_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{$json.zalo_user_id}}',
  'waiting_for_global_confirm',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'pending_item', {{$json.pending_item ? JSON.stringify($json.pending_item).replace(/'/g, "''") : '{}'}}::jsonb,
    'global_match', {{$json.global_match ? JSON.stringify($json.global_match).replace(/'/g, "''") : '{}'}}::jsonb,
    'remaining_items', {{$json.remaining_items ? JSON.stringify($json.remaining_items).replace(/'/g, "''") : '[]'}}::jsonb,
    'mapped_so_far', {{$json.mapped_so_far ? JSON.stringify($json.mapped_so_far).replace(/'/g, "''") : '[]'}}::jsonb,
    'zalo_msg_id', '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}',
    'supplier_code', '{{$json.supplier_code}}'
  ),
  {{$json.parsed_invoice ? JSON.stringify($json.parsed_invoice).replace(/'/g, "''") : 'null'}}::jsonb,
  NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  session_state = EXCLUDED.session_state,
  context_data = EXCLUDED.context_data,
  pending_invoice = EXCLUDED.pending_invoice,
  expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO user_sessions (zalo_user_id, session_state, context_data, pending_invoice, expires_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{$json.zalo_user_id}}',
  'waiting_for_barcode',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'pending_item', {{$json.pending_item ? JSON.stringify($json.pending_item).replace(/'/g, "''") : '{}'}}::jsonb,
    'remaining_items', {{$json.remaining_items ? JSON.stringify($json.remaining_items).replace(/'/g, "''") : '[]'}}::jsonb,
    'mapped_so_far', {{$json.mapped_so_far ? JSON.stringify($json.mapped_so_far).replace(/'/g, "''") : '[]'}}::jsonb,
    'zalo_msg_id', '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}',
    'supplier_code', '{{$json.supplier_code}}'
  ),
  {{$json.parsed_invoice ? JSON.stringify($json.parsed_invoice).replace(/'/g, "''") : 'null'}}::jsonb,
  NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  session_state = EXCLUDED.session_state,
  context_data = EXCLUDED.context_data,
  pending_invoice = EXCLUDED.pending_invoice,
  expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
  updated_at = NOW();

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { recipient: { user_id: $json.zalo_user_id }, message: { text: `⚠️ Chưa tìm thấy sản phẩm phù hợp cho: ${$json.pending_item.item_name}
Sếp gửi mã barcode (8-13 số) giúp em nhé.` } } }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'waiting_for_global_confirm', session_state: 'waiting_for_global_confirm', pending_item: $json.pending_item, global_match: $json.global_match } }];
